max-content-width.description: Maximum width for body content (wider than a book; tables need room)

_self.name: @uniweb/data
_self.description: Data foundation for Uniweb. Aggregates structured records (members, publications, funding, supervisions) and emits Excel workbooks and Word reports. Drives @uniweb/unipress's data-report and directory templates.

Cover.name: Cover
Cover.title: Cover
Cover.description: Report summary: title, a narrative paragraph rendered via Loom (unit-wide counts), a Population selector, and a live stats strip over the filtered member set. Registers a Summary sheet in the downloaded workbook.

content.title: Report title (e.g., "Academic Metrics — 2025")
content.subtitle: Optional subtitle (overridden by active query name when one is selected)
content.paragraphs: Narrative body — write prose with Loom expressions like {COUNT OF members}, {SHOW members.name JOINED BY ", "}, {totalPublications}, {totalFunding}, {totalGrants}, {totalSupervisions}.

Funding.name: Funding
Funding.title: Funding
Funding.description: Research funding received across the filtered member set, grouped by source. Preview is a horizontal bar chart of total amount per source; xlsx is one row per source with Count / Total + a totals row in currency format.

Members.name: Members
Members.title: Members
Members.description: Roster of the filtered member set (name, rank, department, tenured, start year). Registers a Members sheet in the downloaded workbook.

PublicationsByJournal.name: PublicationsByJournal
PublicationsByJournal.title: Publications by Journal
PublicationsByJournal.description: Top journals by publication count across the filtered member set. Publisher (for books) and journal (for articles) are both treated as "venue". Preview is a horizontal bar chart; xlsx is one row per venue plus a totals row.

PublicationsByType.name: PublicationsByType
PublicationsByType.title: Publications by Type
PublicationsByType.description: Aggregates the publications of the filtered member set by type (book, article, chapter, ...). Preview is a pie chart; xlsx is a flat table with one row per type plus a totals row.

PublicationsByYear.name: PublicationsByYear
PublicationsByYear.title: Publications by Year
PublicationsByYear.description: Timeline of publication counts per year across the filtered member set. Preview is a vertical bar chart chronologically sorted; xlsx is Year / Count / Cumulative rows with a totals row.

PublicationsList.name: PublicationsList
PublicationsList.title: Publications list
PublicationsList.description: Formatted bibliography across the filtered member set. Applies the date-range and refereed-only filters and formats each entry through citestyle using the active citation style. Preview uses the per-field HTML citestyle emits; xlsx records citation text + year + author; docx uses a hanging-indent paragraph per entry.

Supervisions.name: Supervisions
Supervisions.title: Supervisions
Supervisions.description: Student supervisions grouped by level (doctoral, masters, undergraduate, apprentice) across the filtered member set. Preview is a stacked bar chart with one bar per member; xlsx is a cross-tab with member rows × level columns plus a totals row.
